element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Early stages introduce simple melee combat patterns
Players learn that armor degrades on single hit; treasure chests contain upgrades
Hidden weapons scattered throughout stages provide tactical options
Navigation between platforms becomes increasingly demanding
Culmination of stage mechanics; requires pattern recognition
Single hit results in armor loss; multiple hits without armor = death; core difficulty pillar

typical_relief_triggers: Discovering safe weapon or armor upgrade in treasure chest
typical_tension_triggers: Loss of armor after single enemy hit
Navigating complex platforming sequences with enemies present
Running low on health with no armor
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: High-intensity action with brief relief cycles; tension escalates toward boss encounters; mandatory replay at harder difficulty extends pacing through subsequent playthroughs

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Treasure chests hidden throughout stages; players incentivized to explore for weapon/armor upgrades
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Off-path treasure chests contain superior weapons and armor; encourages exploration beyond critical path

difficulty_curve.early_game: Moderate; introduction to combat, platforming, and one-hit vulnerability in manageable enemy density
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalating; increased enemy variety, tighter platforming demands, more aggressive boss patterns
difficulty_curve.late_game: High difficulty; dense enemy formations, complex stage hazards, powerful boss mechanics
notable_spikes: First boss encounter establishes difficulty tone
Stage transitions introduce new enemy types with unpredictable patterns
Final stage boss before true ending reset
Second playthrough (mandatory for true ending) at increased difficulty

notable_level_patterns.description: Stage progression controlled by weapon/armor quality discovered in hidden chests; better equipped Arthur advances more reliably; exploration is mechanically rewarded
Single enemy contact strips armor regardless of armor tier; forces precision movement and enemy avoidance; creates constant tension; distinguishes from typical health bars
Each stage culminates in boss encounter; boss pattern mastery required to progress; boss difficulty gates access to next stage and eventual true ending
Completing game once forces replay at higher difficulty to unlock true ending; extends content and increases replayability through escalated challenge rather than new stages
